text:
/mn9 /toge /ci2 4 まったく、どーなってんだよ！
会場はすぐそこだってのに
敵ばっかじゃんか！

/mn17 /toge /ci2 1 よし、やったぜ！
相棒、ありがとな！

/mn1 うあっちゃー……
悪い、無理しすぎた……！

/mn2 ユク姉、無理すんなって！
あとはおれたちに任せとけ！

/mn9 /toge /ci2 4 What the hell is going on!? We're right by the
venue but there's nothing but enemies here!
/mn17 /toge /ci2 1 Yeah, we did it! Thanks mate!
/mn1 Whoa... I messed up, tried to do too much!
/mn4 This is on both of us!

/mn2 Eucie, don't push yourself too hard! Leave the
rest to us!
